reference_answer: Adjustment J-10 was already reflected; it removed 9 duplicate credits before the 260-credit allocation was published.
J-11 proposed adding 18 temporary reserve credits.
No. J-11 was not adopted, so the 18 reserve credits were excluded from the standing allocation.
278 credits: the standing allocation of 260 plus the 18 credits proposed by J-11.

Exception R-4 was already reflected; it removed 6 blocked seats before the official capacity was posted.
No. R-5 failed inspection, so the 12 temporary seats were excluded from the official capacity.
86 seats: the official capacity of 74 plus the 12 seats proposed by R-5.
